nasb.text: Therefore it will be night for you—without vision, And darkness for you—without divination. The sun will go down on the prophets, And the day will become dark over them.

esv.text: Therefore it shall be night to you, without vision, and darkness to you, without divination. The sun shall go down on the prophets, and the day shall be black over them;

cnv.text: 因此你們只有黑夜，沒有異象， 只有黑暗，沒有默示。 對先知，日頭要下落， 為他們，白日變為黑暗。

ccb.text: 因此，黑夜必笼罩你们， 使你们看不见异象； 幽暗必临到你们， 使你们无法占卜。 太阳要因你们而沉落， 白昼变为黑夜。
